column2: Trial Flight TDA and Consultation Package Validation
column3: ['Submit a valid trial flight request to the system. ', 'Verify that the system creates a TDA (Technical Data Package) for the trial flight based on provided information. ', "Check if the created TDA meets CAA's requirements. ", 'Verify that the consultation package is generated alongside the TDA. ', "Confirm that the created consultation package meets CAA's requirements. ", 'Ensure that the CAA accepts both the generated TDA and consultation package. ', 'Confirm proper segregation of the trial flight from other users in the system. ']
column4: ['The system accepts the submitted trial flight request. ', 'A TDA is generated by the system, containing data relevant to the trial flight as per the provided information. ', 'The TDA adheres to all necessary CAA regulations and guidelines for a trial flight application. ', 'A consultation package is produced by the system, accompanying the TDA. ', 'The consultation package adheres to all necessary CAA regulations and guidelines for a trial flight application. ', 'Both the TDA and consultation package are accepted by the CAA. ', "The trial flight is isolated within the system, ensuring it does not interfere with or conflict with other user's data. "]
